2606.12674.title: Evoflux: Inference-Time Evolution of Executable Tool Workflows for Compact Agents
2606.12674.paper_summary: Compact language models (LMs) reduce cost, latency, and deployment risk for tool agents. Yet MCP-style tool use requires more than isolated function calling: an agent must discover tools from live catalogs, satisfy schemas, preserve dependencies across intermediate outputs, and ground final responses in executed evidence. Small planners often generate plausible workflow graphs that fail under tool resolution, parameter validation, dependency tracking, or execution. We argue that this failure mode is poorly handled by small-corpus distillation. A few hundred teacher traces can teach workflow format, but rarely cover the recovery behavior needed to repair failed plans over changing tool catalogs. We introduce Evoflux, an inference-time evolutionary search method that treats compact tool use as the repair of executable tool workflows. It evolves typed workflow graphs through structured edits, execution feedback, adaptive intensity, meta-guided redesign, and diversity pruning. On held-out MCP-Bench tasks spanning live MCP servers and 250 tools, Evoflux raises execution feasibility from roughly 3% to 17-24% across small planners. In contrast, SFT and SFT+DPO on the same search-mined data match, underperform, or collapse below zero-shot performance; ReAct reaches higher peaks, but with higher variance and token cost. These results show that execution-grounded search is more reliable under scarce teacher-trace budgets.
2606.12674.paper_summary_zh: 緊湊的語言模型（LMs）減少了工具代理的成本、延遲和部署風險。<lb/>然而，MCP風格的工具使用需要的不僅僅是孤立的函數調用：代理必須從實時目錄中發現工具，滿足架構，保持中間輸出之間的依賴關係，並將最終響應基於執行的證據。<lb/>小型規劃者通常生成看似合理的工作流程圖，但在工具解析、參數驗證、依賴追踪或執行時失敗。<lb/>我們認為這種失敗模式在小語料庫蒸餾中處理得不佳。<lb/>幾百個教師痕跡可以教會工作流程格式，但很少涵蓋在變化的工具目錄中修復失敗計劃所需的恢復行為。<lb/>我們介紹了Evoflux，一種推理時的進化搜索方法，將緊湊的工具使用視為可執行工具工作流程的修復。<lb/>它通過結構化編輯、執行反饋、自適應強度、元指導重設和多樣性修剪來進化類型化的工作流程圖。<lb/>在涵蓋實時MCP伺服器和250個工具的保留MCP-Bench任務中，Evoflux將執行可行性從大約3%提高到17-24%在小型規劃者中。<lb/>相比之下，SFT和SFT+DPO在相同的搜索挖掘數據上匹配、表現不佳或低於零樣本性能；ReAct達到更高的峰值，但變異性和標記成本更高。<lb/>這些結果表明，在稀缺的教師痕跡預算下，基於執行的搜索更可靠。
2606.12674.author: Kushal Raj Bhandari et.al.
2606.12674.authors: Kushal Raj Bhandari, Ling Yue, Ching-Yun Ko, Dhaval Patel, Shaowu Pan, Pin-Yu Chen, Jianxi Gao
